1: Oh that my head were waters, and mine eyes a fountain of tears, that I might weep day and night for the slain of the daughter of my people!
2: Oh that I had in the wilderness a lodging place of wayfaring men; that I might leave my people, and go from them! for they be be all adulterers, an assembly of treacherous men.
3: And they bend their tongues like like their bow for for lies: but they are not valiant for the truth upon the earth; for they proceed from evil to evil, and they know not me, saith the LORD LORD .
4: Take ye heed every one of his neighbour, and trust ye not in any brother: for every brother will utterly supplant, and every neighbour will walk with slanders.
5: And they will deceive every one his neighbour, and will not speak the truth: they have taught their tongue to speak lies, and and weary themselves to commit iniquity.
6: Thine habitation is is in the midst of deceit; through deceit they refuse to know me, saith the LORD LORD .
7: Therefore thus saith the LORD LORD of hosts, Behold, I will melt them, and try them; for how shall I do for the daughter of my people?
8: Their tongue is as is as an arrow shot out; it speaketh deceit: one one speaketh peaceably to his neighbour with his mouth, but in heart he layeth his wait.
9: Shall I not visit them for these things? things? saith the LORD LORD : shall not my soul be avenged on such a nation as this?
10: For the mountains will I take up a weeping and wailing, and for the habitations of the wilderness a lamentation, because they are burned up, so that none can pass through them them ; neither can men men hear the voice of the cattle; both the fowl of the heavens and the beast are fled; they are gone.
11: And I will make Jerusalem heaps, and and a den of dragons; and I will make the cities of Judah desolate, without an inhabitant.
12: Who is is the wise man, that may understand this? and who is he who is he to whom the mouth of the LORD LORD hath spoken, that he may declare it, for what the land perisheth and and is burned up like a wilderness, that none passeth through?
13: And the LORD LORD saith, Because they have forsaken my law which I set before them, and have not obeyed my voice, neither walked therein;
14: but have walked after the imagination of their own heart, and after Baalim, which their fathers taught them:
15: therefore thus saith the LORD LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will feed them, even even this people, with wormwood, and give them water of gall to drink.
16: I will scatter them also among the heathen, whom neither they nor their fathers have known: and I will send a sword after them, till I have consumed them.
17: Thus saith the LORD LORD of hosts, Consider ye, and call for the mourning women, that they may come; and send for cunning women women , that they may come:
18: and let them make haste, and take up a wailing for us, that our eyes may run down with tears, and our eyelids gush out with waters.
19: For a voice of wailing is heard out of Zion, How are we spoiled! we are greatly confounded, because we have forsaken the land, because our dwellings have cast us us out.
20: Yet hear the word of the LORD LORD , O ye women, and let your ear receive the word of his mouth, and teach your daughters wailing, and every one her neighbour lamentation.
21: For death is come up into our windows, and and is entered into our palaces, to cut off the children from without, and and the young men from the streets.
22: Speak, Thus saith the LORD LORD , Even the carcases of men shall fall as dung upon the open field, and as the handful after the harvestman, and none shall gather them them .
23: Thus saith the LORD LORD , Let not the wise man man glory in his wisdom, neither let the mighty man man glory in his might, let not the rich man man glory in his riches:
24: but let him that glorieth glory in this, that he understandeth and knoweth me, that I am am the LORD LORD which exercise lovingkindness, judgment, and righteousness, in the earth: for in these things things I delight, saith the LORD LORD .
25: Behold, the days come, saith the LORD LORD , that I will punish all them which are them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised;
26: Egypt, and Judah, and Edom, and the children of Ammon, and Moab, and all that are that are in the utmost corners, that dwell in the wilderness: for all these these nations are are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel are are uncircumcised in the heart.
